name: dynatrace/otel-for-dynatrace
summary: Expert guidance for configuring and deploying the OpenTelemetry Collector. Use when setting up a Collector pipeline, configuring receivers, exporters, or processors, deploying a Collector to Kubernetes or Docker, or forwarding telemetry to Dynatrace. Triggers on requests involving collector, pipeline, OTLP receiver, exporter, or Dynatrace collector setup.
